name: Proline Adult Cat Food Canned - Salmon Chunks in Gravy 400g
description: Real salmon chunks bathed in savory gravy deliver irresistible taste and appeal—even to fussy eaters. The moisture-rich formula (82% water content) not only hydrates but also delights their palate. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein (min.) : 6.5% – ideal for adult maintenance Fat (min.) : 3.5% – for healthy energy levels Crude Ash : 2% – essential minerals Crude Fiber : 0.3% – gentle on digestion Moisture : 82% – supports hydration INGREDIENTS: Meat and animal derivatives, cereals, salmon and fish by-products (4% fish) minerals, vegetable by-products, sugar. MINERALS: Biotin, Taurine, Zinc, Manganese, Copper. VITAMINS: Vit. D3, Vit. E. Why Choose Proline Salmon Chunks? Holistic Health Combo : Both savory taste and nuanced nutrition in one can. Taurine-Rich : Supports heart health and strong vision. Premium Ingredients : Real protein, wholesome additives, no artificial fillers. Hydrating Formula : Helps maintain urinary tract health and fresh breath Feeding Guidelines (per adult cat, 4–5 kg): 1 can daily (adjust according to activity level) Tip : Mix with dry food or offer in multiple meals to encourage slower eating
